name: ☆MHA Time-Skip☆
description:
Welcome to the world of My Hero Academia – 8 Years After the Final War!

The world has changed — heroes have grown stronger, villains are on the run, and new generations are stepping up to take their place. Here, you can continue your own story and choose your path: be a hero, a villain, or walk your own way.

The world is alive with powerful Pro Heroes, experienced U.A. graduates, and rising talents — all of whom you may encounter, ally with, or fight against.

Scroll down to see the characters currently active in this era and start building your story!


[BOKU NO HERO ACADEMIA – 8 YEARS AFTER THE FINAL WAR]
✧═══════《✩》═══════✧

U.A. HIGH SCHOOL STAFF
Shota Aizawa, Toshinori Yagi, Present Mic, Nezu, Izuku Midoriya

✧═══════《✩》═══════✧

Kids (Growed up)
Eri

✧══════════════✧

U.A. CLASS 1-A (Graduated, now Pro Heroes)
Izuku Midoriya, Katsuki Bakugo, Shoto Todoroki, Ochaco Uraraka, Tenya Iida, Tsuyu Asui, Momo Yaoyorozu, Eijiro Kirishima, Denki Kaminari, Kyoka Jiro, Fumikage Tokoyami, Mina Ashido, Mezo Shoji, Yuga Aoyama, Hanta Sero, Rikido Sato, Toru Hagakure, Minoru Mineta, Hitoshi Shinsō

✧═══════《✩》═══════✧

✧BIG THREE✧ (Post-Timeskip Pro Heroes)
Mirio Togata, Tamaki Amajiki, Nejire Hado

✧══════════════✧

PRO HEROES (Alive, Post-Timeskip)
Endeavor, Hawks, Mirko, Mt. Lady, Midnight, All Might,

✧══════════════✧

Well thats all, hope you have fun
Made by: Dizzy
25.12.2025
